g.text: Metric | Type | Range | Ordering | Best For
Cosine Sim | Similarity | [-1, +1] | HIGHER = BETTER | Normalized Text
Cosine Dist | Distance | [0, 2] | LOWER = BETTER | NLP Embeddings
L2 (Euclidean) | Distance | [0, +inf) | LOWER = BETTER | Images / Audio
Dot Product | Similarity | (-inf, +inf) | HIGHER = BETTER | Unnormalized

div.p: L2(a,b) = √Σ(aᵢ - bᵢ) Also known as Euclidean Norm
a · b = Σ (aᵢ × bᵢ) Magnitude sensitive

ul.li: Similarity (Dot, Cosine Sim): HIGHER values mean better matches.
Distance (L2, Cosine Dist): LOWER values mean better matches.

div.p: Mixing these up in your Top-K sorting logic causes the engine to return the worst possible results.

text.tspan: // Evict the LARGEST distance (the worst match)
// Evict the SMALLEST similarity (the worst match)
// Evict the LARGEST distance (the worst match)
// Evict the SMALLEST similarity (the worst match)

g.text: When searching for K best results, always track the CURRENT WORST candidate in your heap for O(1) eviction.
